Authorized access Talk to a specialist

Capabilities

A portfolio view without exposing sensitive information.

Public information describes general benefits and scenarios. Models, brands, specifications, configurations and technical scope are shared only through an authorized process.

Do not include classified, restricted, technical or operationally sensitive information in public forms.

Conceptual architecture
01

Intelligence and situational awareness

Capabilities designed to integrate information from multiple sources and turn it into actionable knowledge within the applicable legal framework.

General value

Reduces fragmented information and supports a coherent view of the operational environment.

  • Operations centers
  • Asset protection
  • Inter-agency coordination
Explore capability
02

Critical communications

Voice, data and connectivity architectures for fixed, mobile or deployable operations that require dependable coordination in demanding conditions.

General value

Helps keep teams, control centers and platforms connected when continuity is essential.

  • Remote operations
  • Emergency response
  • Critical infrastructure
Explore capability
03

Signal monitoring and analysis

Technologies to observe, characterize and understand the electromagnetic environment according to each project’s authorization, scope and requirements.

General value

Helps identify patterns, interference and conditions affecting networks and electronic systems.

  • Spectrum management
  • RF diagnostics
  • Technical monitoring
Explore capability
04

Electronic security and countermeasures

Assessment, detection and protection capabilities for electronic risks that may compromise information, facilities or sensitive processes.

General value

Strengthens the protection of spaces, information and operations against technical threats.

  • Corporate environments
  • Sensitive facilities
  • Technical assessments
Explore capability
05

Protection against uncrewed systems

Scalable architectures to detect, track, assess and manage risks associated with uncrewed aerial platforms in authorized environments.

General value

Improves anticipation and response around critical facilities and strategic events.

  • Critical perimeters
  • Strategic events
  • Essential infrastructure
Explore capability
06

Robotic and autonomous platforms

Aerial and ground systems for inspection, observation, transport or remote intervention when reducing human exposure is a priority.

General value

Extends operational reach and enables tasks in complex or difficult-to-access areas.

  • Industrial inspection
  • Technical reconnaissance
  • Emergency response
Explore capability
07

Advanced surveillance and observation

Integration of sensors, optical systems, monitoring platforms and control centers to improve visibility over assets and operations.

General value

Improves early detection, verification and documentation of relevant events.

  • Perimeter security
  • Asset monitoring
  • Command centers
Explore capability
08

Technical investigation and digital analysis

Tools and services supporting the authorized acquisition, preservation, organization and analysis of technical and digital information.

General value

Enables structured, traceable and repeatable workflows for investigative teams.

  • Laboratories
  • Corporate investigations
  • Forensic support
Explore capability
09

Technology infrastructure

Workstations, processing, storage, networks and platforms configured for professional and mission-critical applications.

General value

Provides a coherent, manageable technology foundation designed to grow with the operation.

  • Data centers
  • Analysis workstations
  • Operational networks
Explore capability
10

Energy and operational continuity

Power, backup and energy storage systems that help sustain essential capabilities in fixed or deployable environments.

General value

Reduces interruptions and protects critical systems against supply variations or outages.

  • Remote sites
  • Communications backup
  • Deployable operations
Explore capability
11

Specialized protection

Solutions selected according to risk level, operating environment and personal, physical or operational protection requirements.

General value

Aligns materials, configuration and support with the real use environment.

  • Personal protection
  • Industrial safety
  • High-risk environments
Explore capability
12

Custom engineering

Design and integration of solutions that combine technologies, platforms, services and support around a specific operational need.

General value

Avoids forcing a catalogue and builds an architecture around the outcome the organization needs.

  • Special projects
  • Multi-vendor integration
  • Capability modernization
Explore capability

Public scope

Technical information with context and authorization

Availability, configuration and scope depend on technical analysis, regulations, project conditions and authorization to share information.

Request access

Enquiry

How to enquire about a capability

  1. 01

    Share the general objective without restricted information.

  2. 02

    Our team validates the context and access level.

  3. 03

    An appropriate channel and, where needed, a confidentiality agreement are established.

  4. 04

    An architecture tailored to the requirement is presented.

Eagle Commercial

Is your need not listed here?

Capabilities can be combined in custom projects. Describe the expected outcome and general environment.

Talk to a specialist info@eaglecommercial.com.co

Technology engineering and integration for organizations operating in critical environments.
